name: Taqueria El Cohete
content:
Taqueria in the back of a liquor store. I went here once with a friend while I was under 21, and spent my entire wait time stressing that I would get kicked out of the store before my food was ready. My burrito was worth the stress, both the chef and the other liquor store patrons were very friendly.
I had originally just wandered over to this place while on a three day long trek across the bay, and had little memory of how I got here or what this taqueria was called. I am forever grateful that I was able to re-learn the name of this taqueria several years after I visited.
